pain CHAR 2 x x x x
M1242_PAIN_FREQ_ACTVTY_MVMT M1242 Frequency of Pain Interfering With Activity This field indicates the frequency of pain interfering with patient's activity or movement. 00 = Patient has no pain
01 = Patient has pain that does not interfere with activity or movement 02=Less often than daily
03 = Daily, but not constantly
04 = All of the time CHAR 2 x x x x x
M1300_PRSR_ULCR_RISK_ASMT M1300 Pressure Ulcer Assessment This field indicates whether the patient was assessed for
